x-enumeration-literals.name: Balance Assessment
x-enumeration-literals.description: Monitors the balance of the source account(s) to determine whether a sweep action is required.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Limit Assessment
x-enumeration-literals.description: Compares current balances against predefined thresholds, minimums, or caps.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Availability Assessment
x-enumeration-literals.description: Checks whether sufficient funds are available for transfer without violating other account obligations.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Eligibility Assessment
x-enumeration-literals.description: Ensures that the sweep follows internal policies, contractual agreements, or regulatory restrictions.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Scheduling Assessment
x-enumeration-literals.description: Confirms that sweeps occur at the correct times or intervals (e.g., daily, weekly, or real-time).

x-enumeration-literals.name: Exception Assessment
x-enumeration-literals.description: Identifies cases where a sweep cannot be executed (e.g., insufficient funds, failed eligibility check).
